commentaries.Translation of Bhagavad Gita 2.25: It is said that the soul is invisible, inconceivable and immutable. Knowing this, you should not grieve for the body.
commentaries.Commentary by Sri Madhvacharya of Brahma: he Supreme Lord is verily the manifestation of the inconceivable Himself.
commentaries.Sanskrit to English Word for Word Meanin: avyaktaḥ — invisible; ayam — this soul; acintyaḥ — inconceivable; ayam — this soul; avikāryaḥ — unchangeable; ayam — this soul; ucyate — is said; tasmāt — therefore; evam — like this; viditvā — knowing it well; enam — this soul; na — do not; anuśocitum — to lament; arhasi — you deserve.
